handover.mt_summary: MT-1: _build_verification_json 15개 필수 필드 + BLOCKED 검증 PASS MT-2: _build_final_packet_content [Codex 검토용] 블록 + 독립 줄 승인 코드 PASS MT-3: _check_protocol_consistency PR 본문 자유서술 파싱 제거 PASS MT-4: _write_acceptance_request + _get_ci_run_head_sha 신규 필드 PASS MT-5: cmd_gates_accept packet_sha256_changed + stale_head_sha 검증 PASS MT-6: cmd_hygiene_cleanup_workspace stdout 요약 형식 PASS MT-7: CLAUDE.md + 4개 agent MD 문서 업데이트 PASS MT-8: 35개 테스트 + 4개 oracle 케이스 PASS (35 passed) module integrate PASS

impact_analysis.target_function: pipeline._build_verification_json, pipeline._build_final_packet_content, pipeline._check_protocol_consistency, pipeline._write_acceptance_request, pipeline._cmd_gates_request_accept, pipeline.cmd_gates_accept, pipeline._verify_verification_json_freshness, pipeline.cmd_hygiene_cleanup_workspace, pipeline._get_ci_run_head_sha
impact_analysis.affected_callers: report final-packet, gates request-accept, gates accept, hygiene cleanup-workspace
